name: testDefaultStateOfAddAcquirerDialog
description: Verify default state of the 'Add Acquirer' dialog
descriptionHtml: Verify default state of the 'Add Acquirer' dialog

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify default state of the 'Add Acquirer' dialog

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: Acquirer name field is marked as invalid
Verify: Acquirer code field is read-only
Verify: Challenge URL field is marked as invalid
Verify: Fingerprint URL field is marked as invalid
Verify: Resource URL field is marked as invalid
Verify: 'Active' status is selected by default
Verify: 'EUR' is selected as the default allowed currency
Verify: 'Create' button is disabled when required fields are not filled
